rulings.Case Title: COLBY LAM VS. ANDREW KENNY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 28, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT MJ SF INVESTMENTS, LLC Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default GRANTED. CCP sections 473d and 473.5. Cross-Claimant failed to serve authorized agent for service. Service was not proper on agent's receptionist. Cross-Defendant to file and serve Answer forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The Entire Action Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec 581 (F) (2)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 28, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT SS DREAMBUILDERS, LLC, CHONG HONG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The Entire Action Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec 581 (F) (2) CONTINUED to June 7, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the Reply to Department 501 no later than May 29, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the opposition to Department 501 no later than May 29, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CORINA CASTILLO VS. ROBERTO VILLANUEVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 28, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT ROBERTO VILLANUEVA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff's Notice of Termination does not contain statement regarding reclaiming abandoned personal property, as required by Civil Code § 1946.1(h). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CHRISLETTE PITTEARD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Plaintiff'S Motion To Vacate The Default Judgment, Recall The Writ, And Reentry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 28, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY Plaintiff'S Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Plaintiff'S Motion To Vacate The Default Judgment, Recall The Writ, And Reentry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement DENIED. Notice is insufficient. Service by mail increases the 16-day notice period by 5 days. CCP section 1005(b). Moving party did not establish that Defendant breached Paragraph XII of the Settlement Agreement. Agreement specifically provides that Defendant is permitted one small dog in her unit. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY BARRETT VS. NANCY DOLLIVER JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 28, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT NANCY JOHNSON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. P must specify whether he is proceeding under a Licensor/Licensee (guest) or Tenant/Subtenant theory. Page 1 states D Nancy Johnson is a guest. Page 2 claims D is a subtenant. Page 3 claims possession based on the expiration of a fixed-term lease. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MAOLCHOLM DEBRUS VS. ELENA NEUSTADT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Court Order Compelling Pltf To Appear, Testify And Produce Documents At Deposition And Req. For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 28, 2019 line DEFENDANT ELENA NEUSTADT Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Court Order Compelling Pltf To Appear, Testify And Produce Documents At Deposition And Req. For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. By no later than May 31, 2019 Plaintiff is to appear and sit for a deposition; produce documents per the Notice of deposition. Parties to meet and confer regarding a mutually agreeable date. If parties cannot agree on a date, deposition shall take place on May 31, 2019. Trial is continued to June 10, 2019 for Plaintiff to comply with its discovery obligations. = (501/CFH)
